sources.title: Pooler infrastructure funding targets commercial access corridor
sources.summary: Infrastructure funding aims to enhance access for commercial and industrial sites in the Pooler-area corridor.
facts: Infrastructure funding is expected to improve access for commercial and industrial sites.
The Pooler-area corridor is targeted for this funding.
